title: The insane engineering of Deepseek V4
summary: DeepSeek V4 employs hybrid attention mechanisms combining contrastive sparse attention, hybrid contextual attention, and sliding window attention to handle a 1M token context window. The model uses multi-head columnar architecture, anticipatory routing, and specialized training techniques to achieve efficiency gains while maintaining state-of-the-art performance.
